2.error: T2 is barely a corner — more of a kink after the climb. Scale should be 6, not 5

3.error: T3 direction should be right, not left — cars turn right into Massenet

5.error: T5 is called just 'Mirabeau' by drivers, not 'Mirabeau Haute'

6.error: T6 direction should be right, not left — the hairpin turns right. Also, commonly called 'Fairmont Hairpin' or 'Loews Hairpin' colloquially (hotel sponsor name)

7.error: T7 is not 'Mirabeau Bas' — it's the exit of the hairpin leading down to Portier. Direction should be left, scale 3-4 (medium-fast kink)

8.error: T8 is the actual Portier corner before tunnel entry

9.error: T9 is called 'Tunnel' or 'Tunnel Kink' — the fast right-hander inside/entering the tunnel

10.error: T10 first part of chicane turns right, not left

11.error: T11 direction should be left (second part of chicane)

13.error: T13 is part of the Swimming Pool section — drivers rarely say 'Louis Chiron', they say 'Swimming Pool' or 'Piscine'

14.error: T14-16 are all part of 'Swimming Pool' complex, not 'Pool'

15.error: T15 direction should be left (middle of swimming pool chicane)

16.error: T16 direction should be right (exit of swimming pool section)

17.error: T17 direction should be left, not right — Rascasse is a slow left hairpin. Also drivers typically drop 'La' and just say 'Rascasse'

18.error: T18 is typically considered the main Anthony Noghes corner

19.error: T19 direction should be left — it's the exit kink onto the start/finish straight

gp.errors_summary: Multiple direction errors: T3, T6, T7, T10, T15, T16, T17, T19 have incorrect directions. T5-T7 naming issues around Mirabeau/Portier. T13-T16 should use 'Swimming Pool' not 'Pool' as complex.
